title: oyedaea neei
intro: Oyedaea neei, also known as Hawaiian fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Hawaii. This plant has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Oyedaea neei include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating wounds and infections. Oyedaea neei can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
